GREEK

1. A1 Foundations & Survival

1.1. Unit 1: The Greek Writing System Masterclass → 1.2. Unit 2: The Basics of Nouns & Articles → 1.3. Unit 3: Being & Having → 1.4. Unit 4: Regular Verbs & Negation (Type A) → 1.5. Unit 5: The Accusative Case & Basic Prepositions → 1.6. Unit 6: Adjectives, Colors & Numbers → 1.7. Unit 7: Asking Questions →

2. A2 Expansion & Daily Life

2.1. Unit 8: Plural Nouns & Adjectives → 2.2. Unit 9: Verb Groups B1 & B2 (The Accented Verbs) → 2.3. Unit 10: Verbal Aspect & The Subjunctive (Να) → 2.4. Unit 11: Future Tenses (Θα) & Aspect → 2.5. Unit 12: Building the Simple Stem (Σ, Ξ, Ψ) → 2.6. Unit 13: Direct & Indirect Object Pronouns (Weak Pronouns) → 2.7. Unit 14: The Past Tenses (Imperfect vs. Aorist) →

3. B1 Intermediate Grammar

3.1. Unit 15: The Genitive Case (Possession & Relationships) → 3.2. Unit 16: The Imperative Mood (Giving Orders) → 3.3. Unit 17: Adverbs & Expressions of Manner → 3.4. Unit 18: Passive Voice & Deponent Verbs (-ομαι) → 3.5. Unit 19: Voices, Moods & Special Forms → 3.6. Unit 20: The Perfect Tenses (I have done) → 3.7. Unit 21: Conditionals (The 'If' Clauses) →

4. B2 Advanced Fluency

4.1. Unit 22: Advanced Particles & Spoken Expressions → 4.2. Unit 23: Relative Pronouns (Who, Which, That) → 4.3. Unit 24: Reflexive Pronouns (Myself) → 4.4. Unit 25: Adjective Comparison (Better, Faster) → 4.5. Unit 26: Active & Passive Participles (Οι Μετοχές) → 4.6. Unit 27: Impersonal Verbs & Expressions → 4.7. Unit 28: Idioms & Ancient Remnants →

5. C1 Advanced syntax

5.1. Unit 29: Diminutives & Augmentatives (Υποκοριστικά & Μεγεθυντικά) → 5.2. Unit 30: Compound Words & Prefixation →

6. C2 Mastery

6.1. Unit 31: Ancient Remnants & Formal Registers → 6.2. Unit 32: Participles in the Genitive Absolute (Γενική Απόλυτη) → 6.3. Unit 33: Irregular & Defective Words →
GREEK LANGUAGE COURSE · A1-C2 MASTERY
